name: Great Gratin of Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Yukon Gold or russet potatoes (peeled and cut into 1/16 to 1/8-inch thick slices)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the inside of an oval gratin dish or a rectangular (14 x 8 inches) 2-quart gratin dish with garlic.
2. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Arrange the potato slices in the gratin dish, overlapping them slightly for the first layer. Sprinkle with half a teaspoon of salt, pepper, and half of the cheese.
4. Drizzle some cream over the top and dot with one tablespoon of butter.
5. Repeat layers with more potatoes, cheese, cream, and salt and pepper, as well as butter.
6. For the last layer, sprinkle with remaining butter but keep it free of cheese.
7. Pour chicken broth over the top of the final layer.
8. Bake for 1 1/2 hours, basting the potatoes with the liquid accumulated in the bottom of the gratin dish during baking.
